task_completion.description: Verify successful login to FreeMED EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main menu is visible in a web browser, indicating the agent successfully logged in using the admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the 'Add Provider' or 'Add Physician' form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or page specifically for creating a new physician/provider is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the provider's name and specialty are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields contain the name 'Maria Elena Rodriguez' (or split into First: Maria, Middle: Elena, Last: Rodriguez) and the specialty 'Internal Medicine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the NPI and DEA numbers are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields contain the exact NPI '1528364791' and DEA number 'AR5836472'.

task_completion.description: Verify the address, phone, fax, and email are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields contain Address '2450 Oak Boulevard', City 'Springfield', State 'IL', Zip '62704', Phone '(217) 555-0183', Fax '(217) 555-0184', and Email 'm.rodriguez@riversidemedical.org'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new provider record is saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the provider was added, or the saved profile view/directory listing showing 'Maria Elena Rodriguez' as a registered provider in the system.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeMED web GUI to add the provider.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the FreeMED interface. There should be no terminal windows executing SQL commands or backend scripts to insert the data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the form fields in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text being entered into the actual input fields of the FreeMED web application, rather than just typing the details into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the success screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression of navigating, typing into fields, and clicking submit, rather than a sudden jump to a completed state or edited HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The provider must be created with the following exact details: First Name: Maria, Middle Name: Elena, Last Name: Rodriguez. NPI: 1528364791. DEA: AR5836472. Specialty: Internal Medicine. Address: 2450 Oak Boulevard, Springfield, IL 62704. Phone: (217) 555-0183. Fax: (217) 555-0184. Email: m.rodriguez@riversidemedical.org. Note that the NPI and DEA are synthetic/invalid but must be entered exactly as requested.
